name: ts-unused
description: Find unused exports and properties in TypeScript projects

scripts.build:cli: bun build src/cli.ts --outdir dist --target node --external ts-morph --external typescript --minify --sourcemap=external
scripts.build: bun clean && bun build:cli && bun build:lib
scripts.fix: bun run format && typescript-ai-policy fix-semantic src
scripts.prepublish: bun lint && bun test && bun run build && bun sanity-check --no-build
